titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Division of Biological Sciences records53-2-3214

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-05-10 00:16:46 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Division of Biological Sciences records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Division of Biological Sciences

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Poster with photographs of the faculty of the component parts of the Division of Biological Sciences, Robert Barker, Director. Departments include Neurobiology & Behavior; Biochemistry, Molecular & Cell Biology; Genetics & Development; Plant Biology; Ecology & Systematics; Physiology; and the Bailey Hortorium, as well as members at large and emeritus faculty.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Cornell University Division of Biological Sciences records, #53-02-3214. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Biology -- Study and teaching.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. Division of Biological Sciences

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: Bober, Harry; Brodsky, Josef; Brown, Denise Scott; Burnham, Walter; Connell, Kenneth H.; Goldmark, Peter; Goubert, Pierre; Haley, Alex; Harrison, Anna; Higgins, Joe; Holloman, J. Herbert; Kuntzler, William; Luria, S.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: Mark, Leo; Morison, Elting; North, Helen; Parker, Douglass; Petrarch; Porter, Fairfield; Raimondi, Ezio; Reich, Steve; Rossi, Alice; Shackleton, D.R.; Shomberg, Richard; Strovinsky, Soulima; Sutton, Julia; Todorov, Tzvetan; Urquidi, Victor; VanNice, Robert; Williams, Gordon; Wilson, David; Wilson, Robert.
